title: Lifesteal
description: From Lifesteal SMP, when the player dies, someone can absorb their heart.
body: **Do you like the Lifesteal SMP?** Do you want to play that mod with your friend without joining the server? **Fear not!** This mod allows you to **STEAL** the life of another player. When a player dies, they'll leave behind a star, which another player can pick up, right-click in the _air_, and get a heart. One of the dead player's heart will be removed. # Why this mod? Well, you can choose something that is like the original plugin, but if you want some creativity, you should choose this one! There is an exclusive item, the **Heart Wand**. When you hit a player, their heart will go down.
